description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 24 hrs 29 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 44 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Other (44%), Java (39%), and Markdown (13%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories are listed in the provided data.
